Company Overview

Built for
Federal Work

Blue Nose Construction specializes in federal and military construction and integrated low-voltage security systems. Veteran-owned and operated since 2013, we run our business on the same principles upheld in the military: Loyalty, Confidence, and Intelligence.

Core Capabilities

What We Deliver

Construction Services

  • General Construction & Facility Renovation
  • Design-Build Project Delivery
  • Tenant & Structural Improvements
  • Mission-Critical Facility Construction
  • Smart + Secure Electrical Infrastructure

Electronic Security Systems

  • Access Control Systems (ACE Controllers)
  • Video Surveillance — CCTV
  • Intrusion Detection Systems
  • Turnstile & Physical Entry Control
  • PA & Emergency Communication

Infrastructure + Utilities

  • High-Voltage Electrical & Switchgear
  • Structured Cabling Infrastructure
  • Water & Sewer Line Construction
  • Network Equipment Installation
  • IDIQ Contract Execution

Veteran Affairs · Long Beach

VALBHS Facility
Improvements I & II

Tenant improvement construction across 19 separate active areas throughout the VA Tibor Rubin Medical Center in Long Beach, CA. Scope includes demolition, asbestos and lead abatement, MEP, flooring, concrete, and IT/telecom.

Location: VA Long Beach Healthcare System
Contract Value: $3.25M + $4.75M (2 contracts)
Period: March 2023 – Present
Scope: MEP · Abatement · Flooring · IT/Telcom

Location: VA San Diego Metro Area
Contract Value: $1.3M
Period: September 2023 – Present

GSA · Federal Bureau of Investigation

FBI Switchboard
Modernization

Design-build A/E and construction services for complete retrofit modernization of switchboards A, B, and C — including main breakers, branch breakers, Energy Reduction Maintenance Setting (ERMS) switches, and all related components.

Client: GSA · FBI
Contract Value: $2.6M
Period: May 2021 – February 2022
Scope: Switchboard A/B/C · ERMS · Main breakers

Differentiators

Why Blue Nose

Veteran Ownership
SDVOSB, DVBE, and 8(a) certified. 40+ years of direct federal and military operational experience.
Self-Perform Security
In-house low voltage division — access control, CCTV, intrusion systems with no subcontractor delays.
Active Campus Execution
Building inside live VA hospitals and naval installations with zero operational disruption.
Federal Compliance First
OSHA compliant, EM 385 certified, proactive RFI management, and full clearance coordination.
